headline: Jim Cramer Calls Marriott “The Best” Among Hotel Companies
summary: Marriott International, Inc. (NASDAQ:MAR) was among the stocks on Jim Cramer’s radar on Mad Money, as he advised investors to care about where a stock is going, not where it has been. When a caller asked for Cramer’s opinion of the stock, he said: Alright, here’s the deal with Marriott. Okay, I have told, and […]
